# Test non-JSON input handling
#
# This test verifies that mcpspy can handle non-JSON input gracefully

# Test with input that isn't JSON formatted
cat non_json_input.txt | mcpspy -f output.log -v

# Verify that non-JSON input is processed line by line
cat output.log
stdout "mcp-recv This is not JSON"
stdout "mcp-recv This is another line"
! stdout "  \"method\": "  # Should not have pretty printing

# Count the number of parsed lines
grep -c "mcp-recv" output.log
stdout 2

# Test files to be used
-- non_json_input.txt --
This is not JSON
This is another line
This has some {braces} but isn't valid JSON
